related_evidence.label: Sacramento County Permits: DMOR2026-00064 Residential
related_evidence.title: DMOR2026-00064 Residential
related_evidence.summary: AREA: R02: Full Pool Demolition - Demo permits include structure and foundation/flat work only. No grading is included with this permit.; • Remove the fence (if needed only) to gain access to the backyard and place it back at the end of the project. • Drain pool if necessary • Disconnect Utilities (water, and electrical) • Remove and haul away pool equipment (Pump, filter, and heather) • Electrical lines to be removed from pool panel. Label panel appropriately for spare breakers • Remove all concrete • Haul away concrete and debris • Back fill intervals of 6-8 inches with clean fill (dirt) • Compact to 90% with engineering letter (Soil Engineering) • Perform compact test • Grade area to proper elevation away from the house. For drainage purpose - Demolition – House, Shed, Pool or other Structure (NOT for fire repair)

project_identity.project_name: AREA: R03:  Like-for-like replacement of tankless water heater and gas
project_identity.normalized_key: like for like replacement of tankless water heater and gas

related_evidence.label: Sacramento County Permits: MISR2026-01474 Residential
related_evidence.title: MISR2026-01474 Residential
related_evidence.summary: AREA: R03: Like-for-like replacement of tankless water heater and gas - Removed existing tankless water heater and installed new Navien tankless water heater (199,000 BTU) in the same location inside garage (like-for-like replacement). Upgraded gas supply by installing new corrugated stainless steel (CSST) gas line routed under the house from existing gas meter to the unit to meet required capacity. Completed gas connection, mounting, and startup. All work completed to code. - Miscellaneous Electrical, Plumbing, Mechanical, Solar/PV, Electric Vehicle Charger, Generator (NOT for Remodels)

project_identity.project_name: AREA: R05:  Repipe house drain system

related_evidence.label: Sacramento County Permits: MISR2026-01568 Residential
related_evidence.title: MISR2026-01568 Residential
related_evidence.summary: AREA: R05: Repipe house drain system - Repipe house drain system. Cut out all horizontal cast iron pipe through out house. Install ABS pipe & fittings for 2-bath, 1-kitchen, 1-laundry room. Strap pipe good to use UPC code transition fittings. Test System Replace all horizontal hot a& cold water lines through out house. To use UPC code transition brass fittings to tie into risers. New Brass ball valve for water main come through wall with copper pipe. Test system & flush out lines. Install new ADA height elongated toilet & slow closing toilet seat in hall bathroom. - Miscellaneous Electrical, Plumbing, Mechanical, Solar/PV, Electric Vehicle Charger, Generator (NOT for Remodels)

project_identity.project_name: AREA: R08:  Pouring Driveway over culvert with an automatic gate and bu
project_identity.normalized_key: pouring driveway over culvert with an automatic gate and bu

related_evidence.label: Sacramento County Permits: CBNR2026-00389 Residential
related_evidence.title: CBNR2026-00389 Residential
related_evidence.summary: AREA: R08: Pouring Driveway over culvert with an automatic gate and bu - We will be pouring a driveway going over the culvert on the right hand side of the property. The driveway will go back into the space behind the gate. We will then build a new carport at the back end of the concrete pour. We will use asphalt to cover the culvert. We will build an automatic gate for access. - New Building, Addition, ADU (not a garage conversion), Deck, Patio Cover, Garage, Barn, Ground Mount Solar, Masonry Wall

project_summary: AREA: R08: Pouring Driveway over culvert with an automatic gate and bu - We will be pouring a driveway going over the culvert on the right hand side of the property. The driveway will go back into the space behind the gate. We will then build a new carport at the back end of the concrete pour. We will use asphalt to cover the culvert. We will build an automatic gate for access. - New Building, Addition, ADU (not a garage conversion), Deck, Patio Cover, Garage, Barn, Ground Mount Solar, Masonry Wall

related_evidence.label: Sacramento County Permits: DMOR2026-00044 Residential
related_evidence.title: DMOR2026-00044 Residential
related_evidence.summary: AREA: R02: Pool Demolition (Partial) - Demo permits include structure and foundation/flat work only. No grading is included with this permit.; Scope of Work: 1. Sawcut, demolish, and remove pool/spa shell 2 feet below grade around the perimeter. 2. Break three drainage openings at the bottom of the pool and one at spa, approximately 2 feet wide each. 3. Backfill the pool/spa with soil and compact to complete the partial pool demolition. 4. Remove/cap and dispose of pool equipment and related materials generated by this scope of work. - Demolition – House, Shed, Pool or other Structure (NOT for fire repair)

project_identity.project_name: PG&E ROCKLIN SEISMIC + BUILDING ENVELOPE UPGRADES PACKAGE
project_identity.normalized_key: pg e rocklin seismic building envelope upgrades package

related_evidence.label: Placer County Active Building Permits: BLD21-03502-6056 Warehouse TI
related_evidence.title: BLD21-03502-6056 Warehouse TI
related_evidence.summary: PG&E ROCKLIN SEISMIC + BUILDING ENVELOPE UPGRADES PACKAGE - B,DIV.2 - VACANT. **ELECTRONIC SUBMITTAL - PIONEER PROGRAM TO INTERWEST** III-N.NR THIS PROJECT IS BEING PHASED Scope includes all seismic upgrades required for existing 71,355 SF vacant building at 3625 Cincinnati Ave, Rocklin, CA. Seismic upgrades will include: new braces frames; new columns/foundations to strengthen roof framing; re-nail roof diaphragm; connections between roof member throughout building; strengthening of the 4x12’s and Glu-Lams; additional roof to wall connections; improve panel to panel connections; frame in existing mechanical openings; new openings and infill at existing openings; dry rot repairs at roof. Included in this package are Building Envelope improvements including: complete roof replacement with TPO roof and insulation; parapet details for updated south parapet to meet code distance requirement from adjacent building; replacement and/or addition of scuppers, downspouts and overflows; exterior window replacement; infill and new Openings at existing concrete wall for tenant improvement floor plan; and infill at the niche between the existing 1979 building and the 1986 addition. LRA - NO WUI FULLY SPRINKELED PLACER COUNTY FIRE P.D. . **SPECIAL INSPECTIONS REQUIRED - SEE APPROVED AGREEMENT FOR DETAILS** ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- REV1 ENGINEER JUDGEMENT FOR FIRE RATING OF JOINT ASSEMBLY AT EXTERIOR CONCRETE PANELS - FINAL REVIEW BY INTERWEST 03/22/2022. -BH - Warehouse TI

project_summary: PG&E ROCKLIN SEISMIC + BUILDING ENVELOPE UPGRADES PACKAGE - B,DIV.2 - VACANT. **ELECTRONIC SUBMITTAL - PIONEER PROGRAM TO INTERWEST** III-N.NR THIS PROJECT IS BEING PHASED Scope includes all seismic upgrades required for existing 71,355 SF vacant building at 3625 Cincinnati Ave, Rocklin, CA. Seismic upgrades will include: new braces frames; new columns/foundations to strengthen roof framing; re-nail roof diaphragm; connections between roof member throughout building; strengthening of the 4x12’s and Glu-Lams; additional roof to wall connections; improve panel to panel connections; frame in existing mechanical openings; new openings and infill at existing openings; dry rot repairs at roof. Included in this package are Building Envelope improvements including: complete roof replacement with TPO roof and insulation; parapet details for updated south parapet to meet code distance requirement from adjacent building; replacement and/or addition of scuppers, downspouts and overflows; exterior window replacement; infill and new Openings at existing concrete wall for tenant improvement floor plan; and infill at the niche between the existing 1979 building and the 1986 addition. LRA - NO WUI FULLY SPRINKELED PLACER COUNTY FIRE P.D. . **SPECIAL INSPECTIONS REQUIRED - SEE APPROVED AGREEMENT FOR DETAILS** ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- REV1 ENGINEER JUDGEMENT FOR FIRE RATING OF JOINT ASSEMBLY AT EXTERIOR CONCRETE PANELS - FINAL REVIEW BY INTERWEST 03/22/2022. -BH - Warehouse TI

related_evidence.label: Sacramento County Permits: CBRR2026-00723 Residential
related_evidence.title: CBRR2026-00723 Residential
related_evidence.summary: AREA: R07: Repairs After Fire Damage - Fire damage repair to existing single-family residence. Scope includes replacement of approximately 324 SF of 5/8" ceiling drywall, 127 SF of 1/2" wall drywall, and 86 LF of tape joint tie-ins; replacement of approximately 239 LF of 4:12 roof trusses and 494 SF of 1/2" CDX roof sheathing; full re-roof with approximately 23 squares of laminated composition shingles and associated flashing, venting, ridge/hip cap, drip edge, and starter. Electrical rewire, mechanical ducting, and plumbing replacement to be like-for-like. - Repairs, including Replacing Windows or Siding, Fire, or other repairs

project_identity.project_name: Pipe Burst, Inversion Liner, Drain Repipe: Sewer Line Replacement or Repair.
project_identity.normalized_key: pipe burst inversion liner drain repipe sewer line replacement or repair

related_evidence.label: Sacramento County Permits: SEWR2026-00059 Residential
related_evidence.title: SEWR2026-00059 Residential
related_evidence.summary: Pipe Burst, Inversion Liner, Drain Repipe: Sewer Line Replacement or Repair. - Sewer line replacement or emergency repair of sewer line only. No other work is permitted.; -TTC will replace approximately 110 FT of 2 inch Cast Iron secondary drain pipe with new 2 inch ABS plastic pipe. -TTC will replace approximately 25FT of existing 4 inch Cast Iron drain pipe from the toilet connection in the crawl space to the ABS plastic wye located on the outside of the foundation, with new 4 inch ABS plastic pipe. -TTC will replace approximately 45FT of existing 4 inch Cast Iron and Asbestos Cement sewer pipe from the two-way clean out located behind the house to the 4 inch ABS plastic County clean out located by the fence, with new 4 inch HDPE SDR17 sewer pipe. -TTC will utilize the excavation at the county clean out location to pipeline approximately 7FT of existing 4 inch Asbestos Cement and Clay pipe downstream to the County mainline connection. - Residential Sewer Replacement

related_evidence.label: Sacramento County Permits: CBRR2026-00454 Residential
related_evidence.title: CBRR2026-00454 Residential
related_evidence.summary: AREA: R01: Fence - I am wanting to re-build the front section of my fence where the gate is to my side yard. My total height would be 8 feet. This is to address a 4 ft grade difference causing direct visibility into the backyard. A large section of my backyard is graded up 4 feet. So you can see into my yard. This is strictly for privacy. It will be a 6’ fence with a 2’ lattice top. It is a very small section. The only part that will be 8 feet is about 88” from the house to the upper graded area. I have a bulk pickup scheduled Monday 5/4. And am hopefully planning on doing project 5/2/26. Thank you for your time on this matter. - Repairs, including Replacing Windows or Siding, Fire, or other repairs

related_evidence.label: Placer County Active Building Permits: BLD20-02755-5993 Electrical
related_evidence.title: BLD20-02755-5993 Electrical
related_evidence.summary: KOPP - UNDERGROUND ELECTRICAL SERVICE - Project consists of working with PG&E to go underground with our electrical service from their pole to our house. Existing electric transformer is across Ridge Road from our house. The new pole will be planted on our property on the house-side of Ridge Road so no trenching under Ridge Road is necessary. The new pole will be placed in the existing PG&E easement on our property, so no new easements are required. From that pole, we will trench ~170 feet to our house, ending at the location of our existing electric panel. The old 200A meter main will be removed, the new meter main will be upsized to 400A. The trench is multi-purpose, it will include both electric and telephone (no gas). CURRENT PANEL AMPERAGE: 200 PROPOSED PANEL AMPERAGE:N- 400A SPLIT N- 1-200A W/ E-100A BRK TO E-125A SUB PANEL TO TRANSFER SWITCH 2ND 200A BRK DERATED TO 175A W/60A E-PV W/ 100A BRK TO E-125A SUB PANEL CHANGE OUT / NEW: Change Out - Upgrade WITH PORTABLE GENERATOR AND EXISTING SOLAR PERMIT # BLD18-04691 ****-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- REVISION 6/24/21: CHANGING MSP FROM 400A TO 200A FOR SERVICE TO HOUSE - REVIEWED RM - Electrical

The trench is multi-purpose, it will include both electric and telephone (no gas).
